channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump's anger over Iran thrusts NATO into fresh crisis - Reuters
item.description:
1. Trump's anger over Iran thrusts NATO into fresh crisis  Reuters

item.description:
1. After the Fury: War, Allies, and the World America Is Making  Futura Doctrina | Mick Ryan
  2. Dread deepens among U.S. allies in Asia over a protracted Mideast war  The Washington Post
  3. Trump’s ‘Art of the Deal’ Is Losing Friends and Alienating Allies | Opinion  Newsweek
  4. Closing Air Spaces and Cracking Alliances: Trump’s Growing Problem with Allies  Countercurrents
  5. NATO threats merely weakening the West  The Australian

item.title: The War You’re Not Allowed to See: How the UAE Rewrites the Story of Iranian Strikes - Bellingcat
item.description:
1. The War You’re Not Allowed to See: How the UAE Rewrites the Story of Iranian Strikes  Bellingcat
  2. How the Iran War Cracked Dubai’s Liberal Facade  Time Magazine
  3. Can the ‘Dubai Dream’ Survive the War? Residents Say Life Goes On.  The New York Times
  4. US-Israel-Iran War Live: UK to deploy Rapid Sentry air defence systems to Kuwait to counter drone threat  India Today
  5. The Dubai War Narrative Is Looking a Little Stretched  Bloomberg.com

item.description:
